title: Sophisticated Backpack Recipes
description: Makes recipes and upgrades of backpacks more difficult and balanced
body:
## Archived due to expanded storage being removed from modrinth

Makes the Recipes and upgrades of Sophisticated Backpacks more expensive and balanced.

Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Sophisticated backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks), and [Expanded Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-storage).


<details>
<summary>Leather Backpack</summary>

![Image of leather backpack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b9556d0453f01eaf1921da5323aec350e0946b6.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Copper Backpack</summary>

![Image of copper backpack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68facb9a25f64eb9146e9367a6e831f06f18bfc3.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Iron Backpack</summary>

![Image of iron backpack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6586bb3d80b9a625b7cb7d2f06721122664247e9.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Iron Backpack (Copper tier skip)</summary>

![Image of iron backpack recipe, by skipping the copper tier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/908b9c4eb8f3d0fe79e5541273ad1f958c2e4ace.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Gold Backpack</summary>

</details>



<details>

![Image of diamond backpack recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5815166499d9a47065c717eb3ec81a669a803b0.png)

</details>

~~I couldn't figure out how to make this datapack work as a mod, it seems that sophisticated backpacks overrides the recipes if it is, if anyone knows how to fix this; please contact me on discord!~~~
